trigger_keywords: mover sedimentos al cuello de la botella
sedimentos se acumulen en el cuello

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Lees sediment remains dispersed along the side of a bottle after secondary fermentation and ageing.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Riddling gradually rotates and tilts the bottle from horizontal toward an inverted vertical position.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The sediment slides into the bottle neck, where it can be removed efficiently during disgorgement.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The sediment slides into the bottle neck, where it can be removed efficiently during disgorgement.
